title: More Hide Gui
description: This is a small mod that lets you hide unnecessary UI elements, specifically status effects and the boss bar. I originally created it for personal use, but I thought some of you might find it useful too! :)
body:
This is a small mod that lets you hide unnecessary UI elements, specifically status effects and the boss bar. I originally created it for personal use, but I thought some of you might find it useful too! :)

It’s especially handy on servers to keep your screen clean and avoid distractions.

---

Num_8 - hide HUD elements selected in the mod. (Hotkeys can be changed in the settings).

O - open MoreHideGui settings menu.

---
